articles.title: Rumble to invest up to $20 million in Bitcoin from its cash reserves

articles.description: TL;DR Solana surpassed $100 billion in monthly DEX trading volume for the first time, reaching a total of $109.8 billion in November. Factors such as the memecoin frenzy and low transaction fees have driven its remarkable growth, doubling Ethereum’s volume.
